title: hirtella lemsii
intro: Hirtella lemsii, also known as Lemsii's hirtella, is a plant species belonging to the family Chrysobalanaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hirtella lemsii include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, malaria, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Hirtella lemsii are typically made by boiling the roots and leaves in water to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments.
